untranslatable_reason: Gap down detection requires price action comparison across bar boundaries not directly available in standard indicators. The signal requires identifying a gap down occurrence (prev_close > open) which cannot be reliably expressed with allowed operators. Additionally, specific exit conditions marked as AUTHOR_SILENT lack definition, and exact doji quantification thresholds were not provided in source text.
translation_notes: Translated doji as body_pct < 0.05 (small body relative to range). Gap down component incomplete due to indicator limitations. Performance statistics from source (2-8 median days, breakout counts) recorded but not actionable in rule conditions. Used conservative 5% stop-loss and 8-day max hold based on median candle_end_to_trend_end of 8 days.
